intent: 实现 Fabric 知识流向观测层(dual sink):把'知识每一步人眼可见'落地。当前 stderr 人出口在 CC 上被 exit-0 抑制 → 死的;systemMessage 源码树零出现 → dual sink 是净新增。spec 锚=rev4.4-final.md(Goal A)。
goal: Goal A 观测核心落地:dual sink(client-adapter emitContext 三分支:CC/Codex=systemMessage人+additionalContext AI / Cursor 扁平降级)+ SessionStart banner 重构(人=分组普查/AI=scope=always正文+on-demand计数)+ 注入层 filterByActiveProject 镜像 + config 预设(nudge_mode/observe.*)+ PreToolUse命中gate + Stop value-gated软nudge + Codex matcher 加 apply_patch。终止=task_decomposition 全 done 且 W6 dogfood gate(CC 人能看到 banner systemMessage)过。

in_scope: C1: client-adapter emitContext 三分支(CC/Codex systemMessage+additionalContext camelCase嵌套 / Cursor 扁平 snake_case additional_context 人观测降级)
C2: SessionStart banner 重构(人=分组普查 always-loaded/on-demand/[team][personal]/剔他项目;AI=scope=always正文+on-demand类别计数,替换静态8-id;always正文 bounded by 现有 char budget+超额降级 summary)
C3: 注入层镜像 recall 的 filterByActiveProject(personal+team+project:当前,丢他项目)
C4: config 预设落地(nudge_mode silent|minimal|normal|verbose + observe.* per-event;不变量=nudge_mode只调人出口永不动AI出口;旧数值旋钮保留override)
C5: PreToolUse命中才出systemMessage/miss静默;C4改前未recall→AI-only;Stop archive nudge 软(additionalContext)+value-gated(仅archive-scan报高价值才emit)
C6: Codex hook matcher 显式加 apply_patch(Edit|Write|MultiEdit|apply_patch)
C7: 全测试绿 + 本地 pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit;dogfood 端到端实测 CC 上人能看到 banner systemMessage
out_of_scope: cite-policy-evict 退役 / fabric-hint contract DSL 瘦身(Goal B)
L0/L1/L2 + co-location 读侧 cutover(Goal B)
store 读写底层接线(已在 main 接线,不动)
constraints: Hook⊥MCP 边界:脚本不做语义/relevance 匹配(确定性信号归 hook,模糊意图归 AI recall);always 正文随 banner 是例外(本就该常驻)
改 shared schema 必须 pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build 重建 dist(memory: shared_rebuild_on_schema_change)
client-adapter never-throw 契约(KT-DEC-0007):每条路径静默降级不阻塞 host
源真值在 packages/cli/templates/hooks/;.claude/.codex/.cursor 安装副本由 fabric install 同步,严禁手编
每 wave 收口 git commit(中文提交信息)+ sha 回填 git_commits[];本地 tsc --noEmit 前置闸(memory: local_tsc_vs_ci_tsc)

git_commits.subject: feat(config): nudge_mode + observe.* 预设 + hook nudge-policy resolver
feat(hooks): client-adapter emitDualSink 三分支 dual sink

task_decomposition.done_when: fabricConfigSchema 含 nudge_mode + observe.*;pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build 通过;新增字段 parse 测试绿

verification.verifier: vitest fabric-config schema test + tsc --noEmit + build dist
verification.evidence: fabric-config.ts 加 nudgeModeSchema(4级)+observeConfigSchema(.strict 3键)+ nudge_mode/observe 字段;shared build 绿(dist 重生)+ tsc --noEmit EXIT=0 + fabric-config.test.ts 37 passed(含 nudge_mode/observe 11 新断言)

task_decomposition.subject: hook 侧 nudge-level resolver lib(config-cache reader):nudge_mode → 人出口档位映射 + observe.* 读取;守不变量(只调人出口,AI 出口恒定)
task_decomposition.done_when: 新 lib(如 lib/nudge-policy.cjs)解析 nudge_mode/observe.*,旧数值旋钮 override 优先;不变量单测=任意 nudge_mode 下 AI additionalContext 不变

verification.verifier: vitest nudge-policy resolver test(含不变量断言)

task_decomposition.subject: client-adapter emitContext 重构为 dual sink 三分支:CC/Codex={systemMessage(人), hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName, additionalContext(AI)}} camelCase嵌套;Cursor=扁平 snake_case {additional_context},无 systemMessage(人观测降级);向后兼容旧单参 text→AI 出口;never-throw
task_decomposition.done_when: emitContext 接受 {human, ai}(或等价)并按 detectClient 分三端输出;三端 envelope 形态单测绿;旧调用签名仍工作

verification.verifier: vitest client-adapter test(cc/codex/cursor 三端 + 向后兼容)
verification.evidence: 新增 emitDualSink(payload,opts):cc/codex→stdout {systemMessage(人), hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName, additionalContext(AI)}} camelCase嵌套;cursor→扁平 {additional_context} 无 systemMessage(人诚实丢);unknown→stderr fallback;never-throw。保留 emitContext 不动(向后兼). client-adapter.test 15 passed(3原+12新). parity/install/configs 9 passed(模板重装比对绿)

task_decomposition.subject: plan-context-hint/planContext 扩 always 条目正文(bounded by recall body-tier 预算)+ 镜像 cross-store-recall 的 filterByActiveProject(personal+team+project:当前,丢他项目);确认 scope=always 源字段(activation.tier vs relevance_scope)
task_decomposition.done_when: plan-context-hint payload 携 scope=always 条目正文 + 已 project-filter;rebuild dist;CLI handler 单测绿(always-body 出现 + 他项目条目被丢)

verification.verifier: vitest plan-context-hint test + cross-store-recall filter parity + build dist

task_decomposition.done_when: banner 渲染两片(headline→systemMessage / always正文+计数→additionalContext);快照测试更新绿;budget 超额降级路径有测试

task_decomposition.done_when: narrow hook 经 dual sink emitContext;命中出双 sink、miss 静默、未recall出 AI-only 三路径单测绿

task_decomposition.subject: fabric-hint.cjs Stop archive nudge 改软(additionalContext,绝不 decision:block)+ value-gated(仅 archive-scan 报高价值候选才 emit);接 nudge_mode 调人出口
task_decomposition.done_when: archive nudge 走 additionalContext 软提示;无高价值候选时静默;value-gate 单测绿;decision:block 路径已移除

task_decomposition.subject: Codex hook matcher 显式加 apply_patch:configs/codex-hooks.json PreToolUse/PostToolUse matcher → Edit|Write|MultiEdit|apply_patch;确认 install 同步路径(模板真值改 + 三端副本由 fabric install 重生)
task_decomposition.done_when: codex-hooks.json matcher 含 apply_patch;config 模板测试绿(若有);install 同步逻辑确认

task_decomposition.subject: 全量回归:pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit 绿 + 全测试套件绿(含本 goal 新增/改动 test)

task_decomposition.done_when: 实测证据:CC SessionStart 触发后 systemMessage 人出口可见(截图/transcript 片段/手动复现步骤记录)
